text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Strait of Iran is open — Trump
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗海峡是开放的 —— 特朗普

text: Oil prices drop after Iran announces the Strait of Hormuz is open.
text_zh: 伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡开放后，油价下跌。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇱🇧 During the Lebanon ceasefire, commercial vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz is fully open via Iran’s designated route. — Iran’s FM Araghchi" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Oil prices continue to plummet after Iran's announcement of opening the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 🇱🇧 在黎巴嫩停火期间，商业船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的航道已通过伊朗指定的路线完全开放。—— 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 在伊朗宣布开放霍尔木兹海峡后，油价继续暴跌。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Trump: IRAN HAS JUST ANNOUNCED THAT THE STRAIT OF IRAN IS FULLY OPEN AND READY FOR FULL PASSAGE. THANK YOU!" Trump, for some reason, referred to the Strait of Hormuz as the “Strait of Iran.”
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布伊朗海峡已完全开放，并准备好全面通行。谢谢！” 特朗普出于某种原因将霍尔木兹海峡称为“伊朗海峡”。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says passage for all commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz is “completely open” for the remaining period of the ceasefire. He states vessels are to use the coordinated route already announced by Iran’s…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump thanked Iran for opening up the Strait of Hormuz to commercial traffic. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐表示，在停火期的剩余时间内，所有商业船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道是‘完全开放’的。他声明船只应使用伊朗已经宣布的协调路线……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普感谢伊朗向商业交通开放霍尔木兹海峡。@wfwitness

text: Trump: IRAN HAS JUST ANNOUNCED THAT THE STRAIT OF IRAN IS FULLY OPEN AND READY FOR FULL PASSAGE. THANK YOU!
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布伊朗海峡已完全开放，并准备好全面通行。谢谢！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The USS Rafael Peralta directed a merchant vessel to return to an Iranian port as part of enforcement of the U.S. maritime blockade. CENTCOM reports 19 ships have now complied with orders to turn around since the operation began, with officials maintaining that no vessels have successfully evaded the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 作为执行美国海上封锁的一部分，拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔号驱逐舰指挥一艘商船返回伊朗港口。中央司令部报告称，自行动开始以来，已有19艘船只遵守了掉头命令，官员们坚称没有船只成功逃避封锁。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 Trump again lashes out at former MAGA influencers, calling Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly “low IQ,” Candace Owens “really dumb and mentally ill,” and Alex Jones “completely fried.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 Trump continues his daily crash out, saying the US is the “hottest” country in the world and blaming Joe Biden for the US “being dead.” This is the view you get when your own social media is filled with bots posting AI slop in support of everything you say. The US is, in fact, the laughing stock of the world; some people just don’t say it to Donald’s face because he is clearly cooked in the head, possibly even more so than Joe Biden was. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 特朗普再次抨击前 MAGA 影响者，称塔克·卡尔森和梅根·凯利为‘低智商’，坎迪斯·欧文斯‘真的很蠢且精神有问题’，亚历克斯·琼斯‘彻底疯了’。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 特朗普继续他每日的崩溃式发言，称美国是世界上“最热门”的国家，并将美国“濒临死亡”归咎于乔·拜登。当你自己的社交媒体上充斥着支持你所说一切的 AI 垃圾内容时，你就会得到这种观点。事实上，美国是全世界的笑柄；有些人只是没有当面告诉唐纳德，因为他的脑子显然已经坏掉了，可能比乔·拜登还要严重。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Faytuks News RT @araghchi : In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire, on the coordinated route as already announced by Ports and Maritime Organisation of the Islamic Rep. of Iran. tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转发 @araghchi：为配合黎巴嫩停火协议，伊朗伊斯兰共和国港口与海事组织已宣布，在停火期间剩余时间内，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船完全开放，并需沿已公布的协调航线航行。推文

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Rafael Peralta (DDG 115) directs a merchant vessel to return to an Iranian port as it enforces the U.S. blockade, April 17. Since commencement of the blockade, 19 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around and return to Iran. ZERO vessels have evaded U.S. forces during the blockade. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：4月17日，导弹驱逐舰“拉斐尔·佩拉尔塔”号（DDG 115）在执行美国封锁任务时，引导一艘商船返回伊朗港口。自封锁开始以来，已有19艘船只遵从美军指令掉头返回伊朗。封锁期间，没有船只成功规避美军。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran's FM declares Hormuz Strait "completely open" for rest of ceasefire. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045124893029618019/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯：伊朗外交部长宣布霍尔木兹海峡在停火期间剩余时间内“完全开放”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045124893029618019/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) #BREAKING : Iran announces the opening of the Strait of Hormuz for all commercial vessels for the period of the ongoing 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon/Hezbollah. In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire, on the coordinated route as already announced by Ports and Maritime Organisation of the Islamic Rep. of Iran. - Seyed Abbas Araghchi tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）#突发：伊朗宣布，在以色列与黎巴嫩/真主党之间为期10天的停火期间，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船开放。为配合黎巴嫩停火，伊朗伊斯兰共和国港口与海事组织宣布，在停火期间剩余时间内，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船完全开放，并需沿已公布的协调航线航行。——赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格希 推文

text: Nuno Felix Is there some program that failed and unleashed these retards into the world? As we say in Mississippi, “Bless Your Heart.” Or as you say in the UK, “As-Salamu Alaykum.” - Governor Tate Reeves tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：是不是有什么程序出了故障，把这些白痴放到了世界上？正如我们在密西西比州所说，“上帝保佑你”。或者正如你们在英国所说，“愿平安与你同在（As-Salamu Alaykum）”。——泰特·里夫斯州长 推文

text: Open Source Intel Syrian President, Ahmad Al-Sharaa: ‘Any country's recognition of Israel's claim to the occupied Golan Heights is invalid and illegal because this is a right belonging to the Syrian people. The Golan is Syrian land. It is not for any state to give away or recognize. More than 134 countries from around the world recognize that the Golan Heights are unequivocally Syrian territory, occupied by Israel.’ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：叙利亚总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmad Al-Sharaa）表示：“任何国家承认以色列对被占领的戈兰高地的主权主张都是无效且非法的，因为这是叙利亚人民的权利。戈兰是叙利亚的土地。任何国家都无权将其赠予或承认。全球有超过134个国家承认戈兰高地明确属于叙利亚领土，是被以色列占领的。”推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Republican Senator Lindsey Graham said that Trump is communicating directly with the Iranians, revealing that he recently spoke with them by phone and the conversation became highly tense. ▪️ According to Graham, Trump raised his voice while warning Iran about the consequences if it continued its current course, even to the point of losing his voice. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 共和党参议员林赛·格雷厄姆表示，特朗普正在与伊朗人直接沟通，并透露他最近与他们通了电话，谈话气氛非常紧张。▪️ 据格雷厄姆称，特朗普在警告伊朗若继续当前路线将面临后果时提高了嗓门，甚至喊到失声。通过我们查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarTranslated Russia’s Leningrad region will form mobile fire groups, as the governor says it has become “frontline.” https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045121950624727441/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：俄罗斯列宁格勒州将组建机动火力小组，州长称该地区已成为“前线”。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045121950624727441/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel On this day 22 years ago, Hamas leader Abdel Aziz al-Rantisi was eliminated. He was killed exactly one month after Sheikh Ahmed Yassin. He was a pediatrician by profession. @orfialkov https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045121496524177653/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：22年前的今天，哈马斯领导人阿卜杜勒·阿齐兹·兰提西被清除。他是在谢赫·艾哈迈德·亚辛遇刺整整一个月后被杀的。他的职业是儿科医生。@orfialkov https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045121496524177653/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045121022597210126/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045121022597210126/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says passage for all commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz is “completely open” for the remaining period of the ceasefire. He states vessels are to use the coordinated route already announced by Iran’s Ports and Maritime Organisation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希表示，在停火期间剩余时间内，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船“完全开放”。他指出，船只必须使用伊朗港口与海事组织已公布的协调航线。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel A Chinese firm posted precise satellite imagery of U.S. military assets in the Middle East. Didn't disclose its sources. The imagery identified exact aircraft types at a specific base, those aircraft were later destroyed in an Iranian strike. Congressional analysis points to Airbus Space satellites as the most plausible source. @chinaselect tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一家中国公司发布了中东地区美国军事资产的精确卫星图像，未披露来源。图像识别出了特定基地内的确切飞机型号，这些飞机随后在伊朗的袭击中被摧毁。国会分析指出，空客空间卫星（Airbus Space satellites）是最可能的来源。@chinaselect 推文

text: Open Source Intel India settled a roughly $200 million Iranian oil purchase using Chinese yuan. The shipment of 2 million barrels was carried by the supertanker Jaya. - Reuters https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045119485959352796/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：印度使用人民币结算了约2亿美元的伊朗石油采购。这批200万桶的货物由超级油轮“Jaya”号运输。- 路透社 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045119485959352796/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tens of thousands of displaced Lebanese returning home are finding only ruins. Many are being forced to leave again. Some homes remain standing but are surrounded by destroyed neighborhoods. Ynet. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045118812043784590/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：成千上万流离失所的黎巴嫩人回到家园时发现只剩下废墟。许多人被迫再次离开。一些房屋虽然屹立不倒，但周围的社区已被摧毁。Ynet。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045118812043784590/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - One of the elements being negotiated in the 3 page peace plan between U.S. and Iran, is that U.S. would release $20 billion in frozen Iranian funds in return for Iran giving up its stockpile of enriched uranium — Axios tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯：美伊之间3页和平计划中正在谈判的内容之一是，美国将解冻200亿美元的伊朗资金，以换取伊朗放弃其浓缩铀库存。——Axios 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : A nationwide arrest warrant was issued for an ICE agent in MN who's charged with 2 counts of felony assault. DA Mary Moriarty says she's also investigating several other cases, including the killings of Renee Good, Alex Pretti, and the shooting of Julio Cesar Sosa‑Celis. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045023125964767545/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @TheWarMonitor：明尼苏达州一名移民及海关执法局（ICE）特工被发出全国通缉令，他被控两项重罪袭击罪。地方检察官玛丽·莫里亚蒂表示，她还在调查其他几起案件，包括蕾妮·古德（Renee Good）、亚历克斯·普雷蒂（Alex Pretti）的遇害案，以及胡里奥·塞萨尔·索萨-塞利斯（Julio Cesar Sosa‑Celis）的枪击案。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045023125964767545/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 US President Donald Trump says the United States is the “hottest country in the world right now.” He claims that “just a short time ago” the US was “dead, laughed at all over the world,” adding that “nobody’s laughing” anymore. The remarks come as Trump contrasts current conditions with those under former President Joe Biden. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，美国是“目前世界上最火的国家”。他声称“就在不久前”，美国还处于“垂死状态，被全世界嘲笑”，并补充说现在“没人再嘲笑了”。这些言论是在特朗普将当前状况与前总统乔·拜登执政时期进行对比时发表的。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 During the Lebanon ceasefire, commercial vessel passage through the Strait of Hormuz is fully open via Iran’s designated route. — Iran’s FM Araghchi
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 在黎巴嫩停火期间，商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的航道通过伊朗指定的路线完全开放。——伊朗外交部长阿拉格希

text: 🇺🇸 Trump again lashes out at former MAGA influencers, calling Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly “low IQ,” Candace Owens “really dumb and mentally ill,” and Alex Jones “completely fried.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普再次抨击前MAGA网红，称塔克·卡尔森和梅根·凯利“智商低”，坎迪斯·欧文斯“真的很蠢且精神有问题”，亚历克斯·琼斯“彻底疯了”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: The United States is reportedly discussing a proposal to release up to $20 billion in frozen Iranian funds in exchange for Iran surrendering its stockpile of enriched uranium. The plan is part of ongoing negotiations aimed at ending hostilities, with Washington seeking control over Iran’s highly enriched uranium reserves, while Tehran is pushing for broader sanctions relief. The discussions remain ongoing, with key details unresolved, including the scope of uranium restrictions and conditions tied to the release of funds. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：据报道，美国正在讨论一项提议，即解冻高达200亿美元的伊朗资金，以换取伊朗交出其浓缩铀库存。该计划是旨在结束敌对状态的持续谈判的一部分，华盛顿寻求控制伊朗的高浓缩铀储备，而德黑兰则推动更广泛的制裁减免。讨论仍在进行中，关键细节尚未解决，包括铀限制的范围以及与资金释放相关的条件。@wfwitness

text: China is pressuring Spain to push back against new EU measures designed to strengthen European companies. During a meeting in Beijing, Xi Jinping warned Pedro Sánchez that the EU is becoming too protectionist, which could hurt trade and political ties. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 中国正在向西班牙施压，要求其反对欧盟旨在加强欧洲企业竞争力的新措施。在访问北京期间，习近平警告佩德罗·桑切斯，欧盟正变得过于保护主义，这可能会损害贸易和政治关系。来源：彭博社

text: Trump: Nobody’s laughing!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：没人再嘲笑了！！！

text: 🇮🇷 "In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire." - Iranian FM Araghchi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “为配合黎巴嫩停火协议，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船在停火期间剩余时间内完全开放。”——伊朗外交部长阿拉格希 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish President Erdogan: While maintaining our goal of full membership in the European Union, we expect the Union to overcome its direction crisis and remain faithfully committed to the vision of its founding leaders.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：在保持我们加入欧盟这一全面目标的同时，我们期望欧盟克服其方向危机，并忠实地致力于其创始领导人的愿景。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Today in Tehran, women gather in support of the Islamic Republic of Iran and its armed forces." 🇮🇷 The mothers
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 今天在德黑兰，妇女们聚集在一起支持伊朗伊斯兰共和国及其武装部队。” 🇮🇷 母亲们

text: Turkish President Erdogan: Türkiye is an inseparable part of Europe. The shared challenges we face today have once again demonstrated the strategic value of our partnership with Europe.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：土耳其是欧洲不可分割的一部分。我们今天面临的共同挑战再次证明了我们与欧洲伙伴关系的战略价值。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇺🇦 A U.S. Army Bombardier Artemis II aircraft is currently operating over the Black Sea to conduct intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) in support of Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇬🇧 🏁 Alongside the US Army Bombardier Artemis II , a UK RC-135W Rivet Joint long-range signals intelligence (SIGINT) reconnaissance aircraft and a NATO E-3A Sentry are operating in the Black Sea region. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇺🇦 一架美国陆军庞巴迪Artemis II飞机目前正在黑海上空执行情报、监视和侦察（ISR）任务，以支持乌克兰。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇬🇧 🏁 除了美国陆军的庞巴迪Artemis II外，一架英国RC-135W“铆钉接头”远程信号情报（SIGINT）侦察机和一架北约E-3A“哨兵”预警机也在黑海地区行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: BREAKING: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire, on the coordinated route as already announced by Ports and Maritime Organisation of the Islamic Rep. of Iran.
text_zh: 突发：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希：为配合黎巴嫩停火协议，伊朗伊斯兰共和国港口与海事组织已宣布，在停火期间剩余时间内，霍尔木兹海峡对所有商船完全开放，并需沿已公布的协调航线航行。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: Our belief is that the positive atmosphere we have established with our neighbor Greece should contribute not only to resolving our bilateral issues but also to ending the violations of the rights of the Turkish minority in Western Thrace.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我们相信，我们与邻国希腊建立的积极氛围，不仅应有助于解决我们的双边问题，还应有助于结束对西色雷斯土耳其少数民族权利的侵犯。

text: Zelensky: Ukraine plans to produce air defense systems. This is a serious strategic task that we are moving toward together with our partners.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：乌克兰计划生产防空系统。这是一项严肃的战略任务，我们正与合作伙伴共同推进。

text: 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 A U.S. Army Bombardier Artemis II aircraft is currently operating over the Black Sea to conduct intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) in support of Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 一架美国陆军庞巴迪Artemis II飞机目前正在黑海上空执行任务，为支持乌克兰进行情报、监视和侦察（ISR）。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish President Erdogan: The Gulf countries’ right of access to open seas should not be restricted.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：海湾国家进入公海的权利不应受到限制。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: At this critical stage, we must be prepared and vigilant against Israel’s attempts to sabotage the negotiation process.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：在这一关键阶段，我们必须做好准备，警惕以色列破坏谈判进程的企图。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: If a system cannot protect innocent babies from bullets, if it cannot prevent civilians from being targeted en masse, if institutions and rules cannot stop the oppressors, is this not a structural decay, an ontological corruption? Is this not the clearest manifestation of a moral and legitimacy crisis? How can we be expected to trust a system that cannot pass the most basic test of humanity?
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：如果一个系统不能保护无辜的婴儿免受子弹伤害，如果它不能阻止平民被大规模针对，如果机构和规则不能制止压迫者，这难道不是结构性的腐朽、本体论上的堕落吗？这难道不是道德和合法性危机的最明显表现吗？我们怎么能被要求去信任一个连最基本的人性考验都无法通过的系统呢？

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Sources to MTV: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun will deliver an important speech to the Lebanese people shortly. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 消息人士向MTV透露：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）即将向黎巴嫩人民发表重要讲话。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Lebanese speaker of Parliament Nabih Berri: National unity and civil peace are a red line, and I will not allow it to be crossed under any circumstances. Every bullet fired into the air is an insult to the dignity of the martyrs and a violation of divine laws I am Shiite in identity, Sunni in inclination, and Arab in destiny, and national unity is a red line, and I will not allow it to be crossed under any circumstances' @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri）：民族团结与社会和平是红线，在任何情况下我都不会允许其被逾越。每一颗向空中发射的子弹都是对烈士尊严的侮辱，也是对神圣法律的亵渎。我的身份是什叶派，倾向是逊尼派，命运是阿拉伯人，民族团结是红线，在任何情况下我都不会允许其被逾越。 @wfwitness

text: Turkish President Erdogan: Reading what is happening in Gaza solely as a humanitarian tragedy is insufficient. The genocide in Gaza has very clearly shown what the current system allows, what it chooses to ignore, and whom it protects.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：仅仅将加沙发生的事情解读为一场人道主义悲剧是不够的。加沙的种族灭绝非常清楚地表明了当前的体系允许什么、选择忽视什么以及保护谁。

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz: The IDF holds and will continue to hold all the areas it has cleared and captured. The ground maneuver into Lebanon and the strikes against Hezbollah throughout Lebanon have achieved many accomplishments, but they are not yet complete. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045117624313389497/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨（Israel Katz）：以色列国防军（IDF）已经并将继续控制其清理和占领的所有区域。对黎巴嫩的地面机动和对黎巴嫩各地真主党的打击已经取得了许多成就，但尚未完成。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045117624313389497/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The U.S.A. is the “HOTTEST” Country in the World right now. Just a short time ago, under Sleepy Joe Biden, IT WAS DEAD, LAUGHED AT ALL OVER THE WORLD!!! But not anymore - Nobody’s laughing!!! https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045117306368315535/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：美国现在是世界上“最火热”的国家。就在不久前，在昏昏欲睡的乔·拜登领导下，它已经死了，被全世界嘲笑！！！但现在不再是了——没人再嘲笑了！！！ https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045117306368315535/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Foreign Ministry: "A security incident is being investigated in the park near the Israeli Embassy in London. It is clarified that all embassy staff are safe and that the embassy was not attacked." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列外交部：“伦敦以色列大使馆附近的公园正在调查一起安全事件。现已澄清，所有大使馆工作人员均安全，大使馆未受到攻击。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Axios report: The US considers $20B cash-for-uranium deal with Iran Take this report with a grain of salt. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Axios报道：美国考虑与伊朗达成200亿美元的现金换铀协议。对该报道持保留态度。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reuters: Pakistan deployed 24 fighter jets last weekend to escort Iran’s negotiating team back to Tehran after officials warned Israel could try to eliminate them. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 路透社：巴基斯坦上周末部署了24架战斗机，在官员警告以色列可能试图消灭伊朗谈判团队后，护送他们返回德黑兰。 推文
